name: Close Jira Ticket
description: Closes a ticket in Jira with given number

inputParameters.name: TicketNumber
inputParameters.label: Ticket Number
inputParameters.description: The number of the Jira ticket to close

outputParameters.name: ClosedTicketNumber
outputParameters.label: Closed Ticket Number
outputParameters.description: The ID of the Jira ticket that was closed (e.g. PROJ-123)

outputParameters.name: ClosedTicketUrl
outputParameters.label: Closed Ticket Url
outputParameters.description: The URL of the Jira ticket that was closed
